allow: Bash(gh pr create --base feature/lms-scaffold --head feature/launch-ready-v1 --title 'Phases 1–8: launch-ready scaffolds \(Tailwind baseline → Stripe subscriptions → deploy runbook\)' --body ' *)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(j['name'], j['status'], j['conclusion'], j.get\('steps',[]\)\) for j in d['jobs']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('run_started_at:', d.get\('run_started_at'\)\); print\('created_at:', d.get\('created_at'\)\); print\('updated_at:', d.get\('updated_at'\)\); print\('conclusion:', d.get\('conclusion'\)\); print\('message:', d.get\('message',''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('default_branch:', d['default_branch']\); print\('private:', d.get\('private'\)\); print\('visibility:', d.get\('visibility'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('resources/lang/i18n.json'\)\); print\('Locales:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('Key counts:', {k: len\(v\) for k,v in d.items\(\)}\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,re; t=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\('failures:', len\(re.findall\(r'\\"defects\\":\\{[^}]*\\"[^\\"]+\\":[1-9]', t\)\)\); print\('size kb:', len\(t\)//1024\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('resources/lang/i18n.json'\)\); print\('top keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:20] if isinstance\(d, dict\) else 'not-dict'\); print\('total keys:', len\(d\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else len\(d\)\)")
